React Native Offline Queue

npm

Appearance

React Native Offline QueueOffline-first sync for React Native

Queue mutations when offline, sync seamlessly when back online. Per-action handlers, React Query support, and zero unnecessary re-renders.

Get Started →
API Reference
View on GitHub
⚡

Per-Action Handlers

Each mutation defines its own API call. No giant switch-case — logic stays next to the component that uses it.

🎯

Optimistic Updates

UI updates instantly with onOptimisticSuccess. Data syncs in the background when connectivity returns.

📊

Mutation State Tracking

isLoading, isQueued, isSuccess, isError — built-in state for every mutation. No extra boilerplate.

🔄

React Query Compatible

Use mutateAsync from useMutation inside handlers. Your existing React Query setup just works.

💾

Pluggable Storage

MMKV, AsyncStorage, Realm, or bring your own. Record-based adapters for large queues.

🔋

Zero Re-renders

All hooks built on useSyncExternalStore. No Context cascading — only the component reading the value re-renders.

Released under the MIT License.
